general.title: General Settings
general.autoWatchDesc: Automatically detect new files in imported folders
general.thumbnailSizeDesc: Max dimension in pixels. Applies to newly generated thumbnails. Current: {{value}}px

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.themeDesc: Switch color scheme (applies immediately and saves automatically)
appearance.languageDesc: Switch UI display language (applies immediately and saves automatically)
appearance.masonryDesc: Ctrl/⌘+wheel to fine-tune. Column width ~{{width}}px (columns adapt to window width)

webApi.title: Developer · Web API
webApi.enableDesc: Serves HTTP on this machine while the app is running (port is not listened when disabled)
webApi.allowRemoteDesc: Listen on 0.0.0.0 and require Bearer token; only enable on trusted networks
webApi.tokenDesc: Remote requests must send Authorization: Bearer …

formatIcons.title: Format icons without thumbnails
formatIcons.intro: Set grid placeholder icons (emoji or image) for extensions that cannot generate thumbnails. Overrides default file-type icons when the extension matches.
formatIcons.emptyHint: No overrides yet — add an extension or restore defaults
formatIcons.invalidExtension: Enter a valid extension (alphanumeric, no dot, e.g. blend, hip)
formatIcons.pickImageFirst: Pick an image for this extension first
formatIcons.enterEmoji: Enter an emoji or short text as the icon

fontSettings.title: Fonts
fontSettings.intro: Thumbnail sample text (supports line breaks). After changing, use Regenerate font thumbnails below. For brand font packs, tag folders with
fontSettings.saved: Font settings saved; regenerate thumbnails to apply new sample text

librarySelfCheck.title: Library self-check
librarySelfCheck.intro: The main list comes from the {{assetsTable}} table in {{sqlite}}; this compares on-disk {{itemsDir}} subfolders.
librarySelfCheck.extraDirs: {{count}} extra folder(s) on disk — usually orphaned (no DB row); they are not shown in the UI.
librarySelfCheck.missingDirs: DB has {{count}} more row(s) than items subfolders — some pack folders may be missing or deleted manually.
librarySelfCheck.countsMatch: Counts match; if the main view is empty, check sidebar folder and type filters.
librarySelfCheck.emptyLibrary: Library is empty — import or drag files to add assets.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.intro: Window shortcuts while AssetVault is focused. Custom rebinding is not available yet.

advanced.title: Advanced settings
advanced.warning: These settings may affect performance or stability.
advanced.logLevelDesc: Controls which log levels appear in the terminal. Dev defaults to debug, production to info. Can also be overridden via ASSETVAULT_LOG_LEVEL env var.
advanced.searchDebounceDesc: Delay before search runs (ms). Applies on save. Current: {{value}}ms
advanced.maxCacheDesc: In-memory thumbnail LRU cap (applies on save). Current: {{value}}MB
